data.title: Blackstone's assets under management reach $1.27 trillion, with distributable earnings rising 3% Y/Y to $2.24 billion in Q4. Fee-related earnings of $1.54 billion see fluctuations in different segments.
data.description: Blackstone (BX) announced its fourth-quarter financial results, with distributable earnings per share reaching $1.75, marking a 4% increase year over year. This surpassed the analyst consensus of $1.53. The quarter saw distributable earnings grow by 3% year over year, totaling $2.24 billion. Segment revenues stood at $3.94 billion, a 5% decrease from the previous year but surpassing analyst expectations of $3.72 billion. Fee-related earnings dropped by 16% year over year to $1.54 billion, with real estate experiencing a 39% increase and credit and insurance up by 14% year over year. On the other hand, fee-related earnings declined by 52% in private equity and 4% in the Multi-Asset Investing segments. Net accrued performance revenue also saw an increase, rising to $6.74 billion during the quarter from $6.28 billion previously. More details available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Public company director pay rises by 3% according to NACD report. Key findings on board expectations and trends.
data.description: Today, the National Association of Corporate Directors (NACD) released its yearly Director Compensation Report, which is considered the benchmark for analyzing public company board pay practices, structures, and trends. The report, based on data from various public companies, provides valuable insights into the compensation of board directors. According to the findings revealed in Washington on January 29, 2026, the NACD highlighted the current trends and practices in director compensation within public companies. This report serves as a vital resource for understanding the remuneration of board members, offering key information for companies aiming to stay competitive in attracting and retaining top talent for their boards. With its comprehensive analysis, the report is an essential reference point for companies looking to optimize their director compensation strategies in line with industry standards.

data.title: Palo Alto Networks acquires Chronosphere for AI-era observability and security, enabling real-time monitoring and protection.
data.description: A company based in Santa Clara, California announced on January 29, 2026, that they are providing real-time visibility, monitoring, and protection for large amounts of data used in AI-driven digital operations. This move comes as businesses are more dependent on AI to manage digital tasks, safeguard resources, and spur development.

data.title: Hilb Group acquires Pennsylvania P&C agency, expanding Mid-Atlantic presence, effective Jan 1, 2026.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, in Richmond, Virginia, the Hilb Group revealed the acquisition of a property and casualty agency situated in Pennsylvania. The transaction was completed on January 1, 2026, allowing the company to broaden its range of products and services across the Mid-Atlantic region.

data.title: Newport Healthcare promotes Dr. Brent Nelson to Chief Innovation & Optimization Officer, enhancing commitment to advanced behavioral health care.
data.description: Newport Healthcare in Nashville, Tennessee, reaffirmed its dedication to enhancing high-quality, creative behavioral health services on Jan. 29, 2026. An esteemed provider of evidence-based behavioral health treatment, Newport Healthcare disclosed the advancement of Brent Nelson, MD to a new role.

data.title: Global silver shortage leads to historic $100 breakout per ounce, a major shift in market dynamics.
data.description: Americore Resources Corp. announced on Jan. 29, 2026, that silver surpassed $100 per ounce for the first time in history. This milestone signifies a significant structural change in the market, with real discovery momentum taking charge.

data.title: TGE Value Creative Solutions Corp permits separate trading of Class A shares and warrants post IPO. (Characters: 90)
data.description: On January 29, 2026, TGE Value Creative Solutions Corp made a statement in New York and Paris, revealing that holders of units from the Company's recent initial public offering now have the option to divide the Class A ordinary shares and warrants they obtained. This option is immediately available to the interested individuals.

data.title: SolarEdge is shipping US-made residential solar inverters to Europe, unveiling simplified product range.
data.description: SolarEdge, a company based in Milpitas, California, has begun exporting its initial U.S.-made Single SKU residential inverter products to major European markets. This marks a significant milestone for the company as it expands its reach globally. The inverter products are designed specifically for residential use and are expected to meet the growing demand for solar energy solutions in Europe. The move also signifies SolarEdge’s commitment to manufacturing in the United States while catering to international markets. This step is vital for the company's growth strategy, as it aims to tap into the lucrative European market.

data.title: Unicycive Therapeutics FDA accepted NDA resubmission for OLC, a phosphate binder for CKD, with PDUFA target date of June 29, 2026.
data.description: On January 29, 2026, Unicycive Therapeutics, Inc. disclosed that the FDA has accepted the resubmission of its NDA for oxylanthanum carbonate (OLC), an investigational oral phosphate binder intended for treating hyperphosphatemia in CKD patients on dialysis. The resubmission was categorized as a Class II complete response, triggering a six-month review period from the resubmission date. The FDA has set a PDUFA target action date for June 29, 2026. Unicycive, a clinical-stage biotech company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol UNCY, specializes in developing therapies for kidney disease.

data.title: Arrow Finl (NASDAQ: AROW) beat earnings by 6.0% with EPS of $0.85, revenue up $9.50 million YoY in Q4 2026.
data.description: Arrow Financial Corporation, trading on NASDAQ under the symbol AROW, revealed its Q4 earnings on Thursday, January 29, 2026, at 08:00 AM. In their earnings report, Arrow Financial exceeded estimated earnings by 6.0%, presenting an EPS of $0.85 as opposed to the predicted $0.80. Their revenue also saw a notable increase of $9.50 million compared to the corresponding period in the previous year. Looking back at the prior quarter, the company had outperformed expectations... More details on this report can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Viewbix achieves significant milestone with large increase in viewership.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global unemployment rate has reached 6.7%, with approximately 200 million people currently out of work worldwide. Furthermore, the study indicates that the COVID-19 pandemic has played a significant role in this increase, leading to a surge in job losses across various sectors. Economists are now closely monitoring the situation to assess the long-term repercussions of this widespread unemployment. The data highlights the urgent need for government intervention and support to address the growing unemployment crisis.

data.title: The O.H.I.O. Fund closes 30th investment with Hyperframe and adds three new team members, driving economic growth in Ohio.
data.description: A private fund investment adviser in Ohio, The O.H.I.O. Fund, has completed its 30th investment with Hyperframe, a company specializing in streamlining construction processes. The fund aims to boost economic prosperity in Ohio by leveraging its momentum. The O.H.I.O. Fund manages two funds that have shown strong performance. Additionally, the team has welcomed three new members. This latest investment marks a milestone for the fund as it continues its mission to drive growth in the state.

data.title: HKW announces merger of EEE and Endpoint, enhancing electrical power product offerings and customer reach.
data.description: Today, HKW revealed that its portfolio company, Electric Equipment Engineering (EEE), a company specializing in electrical power products and solutions, has finalized a strategic merger with Endpoint Industrial Controls, a Loveland, Colorado-based firm with a similar focus. This merger will bolster the capabilities of both EEE and Endpoint, allowing them to introduce a wider range of products and cater to a larger customer base in the electrical power sector. The consolidation promises greater reach and efficiency for these companies.

data.title: Gold prices surge towards $5,600, up 100% over past year, as Bitcoin faces decline. Time for Bitcoin to shine?
data.description: Gold prices have surged dramatically over the past year, increasing by a whopping 100% recently and reaching record highs consistently. This remarkable rally prompts the question of when Bitcoin will experience a similar surge in value.

data.title: Deckorators expands PGA TOUR presence with new player sponsorships and 2026 event lineup, sponsoring four PGA TOUR pros at Farmers Insurance Open.
data.description: Deckorators, a top innovator in outdoor living solutions, has revealed an exciting development in their partnership with the PGA TOUR. The company announced on January 29, 2026, that they will now be sponsoring four PGA TOUR professionals. This expansion of their marketing partnership comes as Deckorators continues to make a significant impact in the industry. The announcement was made in Grand Rapids, Michigan.

data.title: Jazz at Lincoln Center announces leadership transition after 40 years under Wynton Marsalis. New era ahead.
data.description: Jazz at Lincoln Center's Board of Directors revealed on January 29, 2026, their plans for a leadership transition following Wynton Marsalis’ remarkable 40-year tenure. The organization aims to honor Marsalis' legacy while moving forward with new leadership.

data.title: UK House of Lords to investigate stablecoins as Bank of England finalizes rules. Regulators caution stablecoins may impact deposits and payment systems.
data.description: As lawmakers investigate, regulatory authorities have issued warnings that stablecoins have the potential to deplete bank deposits and transform the landscape of payments. The inquiry into stablecoins by the parliament is occurring amidst growing concerns about their impact on financial systems. Regulators caution that these cryptocurrencies could significantly alter the traditional banking sector and pose risks to stability. This development underscores the heightened scrutiny on stablecoins as they gain popularity and influence in the market.

data.title: Investors urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for losses in Smart Digital between May 5, 2025, and September 26, 2025.
data.description: James Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Smart Digital to get in touch with him directly to explore their potential courses of action. If you bought or obtained securities in Smart Digital during the period from May 5, 2025, to September 26, 2025, at 9:34 AM, it is advised to reach out to him for assistance.

data.title: Concerto Biosciences partners with Sacco System for microbial ingredient discovery, utilizing AI platform.
data.description: Concerto Biosciences, a company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, revealed their partnership with Sacco System in a recent announcement on January 29, 2026. In this collaboration, Concerto will be leveraging its full stack data generation and AI platform to enhance the microbial collections of Sacco System. This development marks a significant step in advancing biotechnology, with Concerto bringing its expertise to the table. The partnership has the potential to revolutionize microbial research, tapping into Concerto's innovative technology. This news signifies a union between Concerto Biosciences and Sacco System that aims to push the boundaries of microbial science using cutting-edge data and AI capabilities.

data.title: Chartwells K12 launches "Bloom Into Breakfast," offering students fresh breakfast options beyond mornings.
data.description: Chartwells is reshaping the school cafeteria experience in Charlotte, North Carolina. On January 29, 2026, they announced a new approach to meals, incorporating both winter classics and springtime options. Students can now delight in breakfast offerings throughout the day. Chartwells K12 is leading this change, emphasizing variety and inclusivity in school dining.
